title: Optimized Binary Tree Rotation
scenario: Generate a Python function that takes as input a binary tree and rotates it to minimize the height of the tree while preserving the original tree structure. The input tree is represented as a dictionary where each key is a node ID and each value is another dictionary containing the left and right child node IDs. The output should be the rotated tree represented in the same format. The rotation should be performed in-place. The prompt should be under 300 characters.
constraints: Rotate the tree to the right and left for all internal nodes in-place

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the Python code is syntactically correct.
Check if the rotation algorithm produces the expected results for all internal nodes.
Check if the code is readable and follows standard Python coding practices.
